name: Ice Bread and Butter Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Put sliced cucumbers and onions in a large container in the following manner: a layer of onions and cucumbers, sprinkle with part of the 1/2 cup salt, then a layer of chopped ice.
2. Continue layering until all vegetables are covered, ending with salt and ice.
3. Let stand for about 3 hours or until the ice has melted.
4. Remove from the salt water solution and let drain for a few minutes.
5. Add turmeric, celery seeds, mustard seeds, vinegar, and sugar to the container.
6. Bring to a good boil (up to 10 minutes) and seal in jars.
